.file-embed.background: rgb(176, 176, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(176, 176, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar-item.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #C5C5C5 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#C5C5C5, color-mix(in srgb, #C5C5C5 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #C5C5C5 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#C5C5C5, color-mix(in srgb, #C5C5C5 65%, transparent))
body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(176, 176, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(197, 197, 197) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(176, 176, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(176, 176, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: color(srgb 0.133333 0.133333 0.133333 / 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(176, 176, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(176, 176, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")

input.prompt-input[type=\"text\"].background: rgb(205, 205, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(205, 205, 205) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(225, 225, 225) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(148, 178, 147) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(225, 225, 225) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(225, 225, 225) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
